title: The Riku Truth Emerges
description: Pages 1–5 focus on the riku truth emerges, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as dressrosa's past and the suffering of the Riku family deepen the stakes behind Rebecca, the toys, and Doflamingo's rule.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: in the basement of the colos- Seum...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Guah!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Oh, oh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: They keep falling, one after the other....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: gyahhh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Uuhhh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Ah...!! Gramps!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Uhh, shit *cough cough*!! What the hell is this!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: A mountain of garbage and toys!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: So you came too, boo...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: That's also what we want to know....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You should move from there. Othe- Rs will be falling.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: ...to think that in this coun- try's under- ground...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Such a massive scraphea p would exist...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Former Gladator: Ricky

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: If I'm wrong... then please forgive me, but...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: I just have this nagging feeling...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Yer... I mean... you are...!!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: KING RIKU...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Aren't you....!?

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: King Riku!?

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: King Riku!? Don't be stupid...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Isn't he dead....!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Shihaha, dress- Rosa's...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Last King...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: I heard he just went mad.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Nugepone symptoms

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: ...indeed, I am.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: After falling to such depths within the earth...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: I suppose there's no use in hiding it anymore...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: But you should no longer call me "King",

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: I'm merely an old man at this point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Squad Captain tank.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: An old man with Naught but a grand- child I could not save... and my deep crimes.

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: King Riku...!! Thank goodness you're alive....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: It's been far too long!! ...!!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Former King of Dressrosa: RIKU DORDE III

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: It's King Riku!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: The truth is, I am now Doflamin- go's...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: (Rebecca's grandfather)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: So he is alive after all!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: No need to say it... I'm already aware....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: You're protecting Viola for me, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: I would never doubt a man as virtuous as yourself.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: It must have been a painful decision!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: No, compared to yours, it was nothing....!!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Hey, what the hell!? So you were King Riku all along!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: ...Ahh.

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: The King of Pro- Dense...!!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: This brings back memories!! You aided my country during hard times all too often!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: Glad to see you alive!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: Ever since you vanished...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: The balance between the surrounding countries was thrown, and there's been nothing but war!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: It's gotten to be a real pain....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: Eliza- Bello!! It might be a pain to you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: But one man's pain is another's profit!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: There's someone who's been drumming up the wars from behind the scenes,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: and doing quite well for himself as a result.....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: He keeps selling weapons to these warring nations!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #52
dialogue.text: Hiya Haya it's the broker, "Joker"!! That's Doflamingo's underworld alias,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #53
dialogue.text: But we don't know where the weapons are being made and stored.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #54
dialogue.text: In regards to the wars of our fair Kanokuni...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #55
dialogue.text: He's been providing weapons to our enemies.

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: So our Happou Navy, under orders from the King of Kanokuni...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #56
dialogue.text: Has come to put a stop to this secret weapons trade! That's our true purpose here!!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: King Riku! Your strange actions led to Doflamingo becoming King...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #57
dialogue.text: And thanks to that, weigh- boring cousin- tries are facing untold hardship!!

summary: The Riku Truth Emerges focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as dressrosa's past and the suffering of the Riku family deepen the stakes behind Rebecca, the toys, and Doflamingo's rule.
